college_info.intro: Check out more on Sri Sathya Sai Institute of Higher Learning, Anantapur in the below video:

faqs.answer: A:    Both the colleges SSIHL (Sri Sathya Sai Institute of Higher Learning ) and SRM are best for placements it depends upon how you perform in college. how much your score, how many skills you know, and how creative you are the more knowledgeable you are get more chances you have for placements it doesn't depend on your college or university it all depends on you can take counseling for your career from Shiksha.com. the companies will hire you based on your skills or knowledge.
faqs.question: Does Sri Sathya Sai Institute of Higher Learning offer better placements than SRM University, Andhra Pradesh?

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Food and Nutritional Sciences - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Good faculty and good placements in 2016.

review_content.Placements: The packages offered in my course ranges from 30k-5k INR per month. Startups visit our college oftenly and MNCs such as Wipro, Tata, Infosys, etc. The college provides good placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college is beautiful and Wi-Fi network facilities are available. Labs, classrooms and library are present. Canteen’s food is delicious and is of good quality. Medical facilities are available in the campus. Sports and games are interesting.
review_content.Faculty: Our lecturers are very knowledgeable. The teaching quality is very rich. The course is curriculum relevant. Students become ready for the industrial purpose. Semester exams are difficult in this college and the pass percentage is high.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Our college provides high-quality teaching.

review_content.Placements: About 80% of the students of passing out batch got placed in the previous year. The highest salary package offered was around 12 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered was around 5.5 LPA. The average salary package offered was around 7 LPA. Deloitte, KPMG and Godrej Properties are the top recruiting companies on our campus. None of the students opted out of internship opportunities. Customer support, financial analyst and marketing executive are the roles offered here.
review_content.Infrastructure: Lab facilities and Wi-Fi facilities are world-class here. The hostel is maintained hygienically, and the food served is tasty and nutritious. There are many in-house games competitions. There is also a dispensary in our hostel as well as in our institute. There are separate lab facilities with good infrastructure.

faqs.answer: For UG courses admission, candidates must have minimum 60% aggregate in Class 12. Candidates can apply online on the official website of SSSIHL. Selection will be done on the basis of merit prepared by SSSIHL Anantpur. The shortlisted candidates will be asked to attend an online interview. For MBA programme, eligible applicants have to appear CAT/MAT entrance exam or an online admission test conducted by SSSIHL. At the time of admission, candidates need to submit required documents, such as Original Marks Certificate, Transfer Certificate, Conduct Certificate and Health record.

review_summary.college_name: Sri Sathya Sai Institute of Higher Learning Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Discontinued (May 2024) Bachelor of Arts (B.A.) - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Great campus and facilities in Sathya Sai but lacking in academic support for BA Department.

content.Placements: Honestly, the college did not offer any placement opportunities for the BA students, and there were no such opportunities that we could rely upon for our career expansion. But however I would like to mention in terms of other departments like MBA and B.Com., there was a wide spectrum of opportunities and placement drives were available.
content.Infrastructure: The department was well equipped with smart boards and had a media library as well for any digital work. There was a huge library, which houses thousands of books ranging from any subject matter to any language. The science department also has well-equipped laboratories. Talking about the hostel mess, I can guarantee that this hostel is the best hostel in terms of serving warm and sumptuous food along with so much love. There was never a day we would not look forward to the food. The campus life was also very hectic, as we were involved in many activities like sports, drama, fine arts, and music. Medical facilities were available where a nurse was appointed for 24 hours as there were no day scholars and all of them were residential students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Mathematics - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: An above-average college for B.Sc.

content.Placements: Around 30–40% of students get placed in our college. At our college, the average package offered was between 2 and 5 LPAs. The top recruiters in college were local companies like Star5Series, Miraj, Arcade, etc. The top roles offered were data entry, technical support, sales, etc.
content.Infrastructure: This college had an average infrastructure for our course. There were limited facilities, like labs for Physics and Chemistry, a library, Wi-Fi, etc., in our college. The college also provided hostel facilities to its students. The food in the hostel mess was of average quality.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Food and Nutritional Sciences - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Good faculty and good placements in 2016.

content.Placements: The packages offered in my course ranges from 30k-5k INR per month. Startups visit our college oftenly and MNCs such as Wipro, Tata, Infosys, etc. The college provides good placements.
content.Infrastructure: Our college is beautiful and Wi-Fi network facilities are available. Labs, classrooms and library are present. Canteen’s food is delicious and is of good quality. Medical facilities are available in the campus. Sports and games are interesting.
content.Faculty: Our lecturers are very knowledgeable. The teaching quality is very rich. The course is curriculum relevant. Students become ready for the industrial purpose. Semester exams are difficult in this college and the pass percentage is high.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Our college provides high-quality teaching.

content.Placements: About 80% of the students of passing out batch got placed in the previous year. The highest salary package offered was around 12 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered was around 5.5 LPA. The average salary package offered was around 7 LPA. Deloitte, KPMG and Godrej Properties are the top recruiting companies on our campus. None of the students opted out of internship opportunities. Customer support, financial analyst and marketing executive are the roles offered here.

individual_reviews.course: Discontinued (May 2024) Bachelor of Arts (B.A.) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Our college has good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: There are some 30-39 students in each class, and it varies from course to course. I will continue with B.Ed as placements are not valid for B.Pass-outs immediately. We need some sort of professional course. Teaching is not what I want to pursue.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel food is good. All sorts of delicacies are served with love and care. Every week with special food was served twice. We have evening snacks daily in which we get to eat different food items. Our institute is well built with the required infrastructure like a library, labs, etc.

admission_overview.college_name: Sri Sathya Sai Institute of Higher Learning Admission 2025: Eligibility, Application & Selection Process

paragraphs: SSSIHL admission process 2025is based on themerit listfor all UG courses. The application process is completely online at the institute.

Sri Sathya Sai Institute of Higher Learning (SSSIHL), Anantapur offers a wide range ofUG programmesincludingBSc, BA, BCometc., and also offers a few PG programmes, such as MBA and MTech. For theMBA,SSSIHLaccepts admission on the basis ofCAT/CMAT/ XATfollowed by GD & PI. Candidates must have a minimum60% aggregatein Class 12 for UG course admission. The shortlisted candidates will be asked to attend anonline interviewby SSSIHL.

Established bySri Satya Sai Baba, SSSIHL is a modern Gurukala which inculcates ethical and moral values in students. Currently, admissions are open forPhDprogrammes. The admission acceptance rate at the institute is23%. Candidates seeking admission for the 2025 academic year, are advised to go through the admission prospectus. Check out the SSSIHL admission 2025 details below:
Particulars
SSSIHL AdmissionHighlights 2025
Mode of study
Full-time/ Offline
Application status 2025
Open [for PhD]
Fee range across the courses
INR 1.20 lakh (MBA)

Popular programmes
Admission Brochure 2025
SSSIHL Admissions Prospectus

At the undergraduate level, there are several courses available inHumanities, Social Sciences,Management & Commerce and Sciences. The requirements for admissions vary from programme to programme at SSSIHL. There isno entrance testforundergraduateprogrammes admission. Applications will be shortlisted based onmerit. Below are the SSSIHL eligibility and selection criteria details for some of theSSSIHL courses:
Eligibility
Minimum 50 % aggregate in graduation from a recognised institute/ university
XAT/ CAT + GD&PI
Minimum 60 % aggregate in Class 12 from a recognised institute/ university
Merit-based + Interview
At least 60 % aggregate in Class 12 from a recognised institute/ university
Merit-based + Interview
At least 50 % aggregate in graduation from a recognised institute/ university
GATE/ CSIR/ JEST + Viva Voce
At least 60% aggregate in graduation from a recognised institute/ university
Merit-based + Interview

Sri Sathya Sai Institute provides education without any fee (except for a few programmes) to students. The fee waiver includes tuition, exams, lab, library, sports, medical assistance etc. Professional programmes, such as MBA and MTech, are chargeable. Further, the seat intake for ME/MTech is 36, and BBM/BMS is 80.

Coming to affordability, It is among the causes of many students quitting college or their degree. Although the availability of student loans and scholarships has made education more affordable, qualifying for one of these loans or scholarships frequently comes with a set of requirements that must be met. Find below theSSSIHL tuition fee, seats along with average package details for the MBA course:
Course Name
Tuition Fee (Investment)
Average Package (Return)
INR 1.20 lakh
INR 5.5 lakh
Note: Candidates must note that this information is sourced from the official website of the institute/university-sanctioning body and is subject to change.

Eligible candidates seeking admission to SSIHL courses can applyonlineby filling out an application form. Once candidates have successfully completed their application form, wait to hear from the institute in regards application. The selection process varies from programme to programme at SSIHL. Find below the step-by-step SSIHL admission process 2025:
Step 1: Application: Apply online on the official website of SSSIHL @sssihl.edu.in

Step 2: Selection round:Candidates will be selected on the basis ofmeritfor allUG courses admission.The shortlisted candidates will be asked to attend anonline interview. There is no admissions test for UG programmes at SSSIHL. The selected individuals (on the list) will also receive an email confirming this.

For the MBA, eligible applicants will be asked to take anonline admissions test. Shortlisted candidates will then be invited for anofflineGroup Discussionand aninterview. Applicants with valid scores inCAT/CMAT/ XATare exempted from the admissions test and will be invited directly for the offline Group Discussion round, followed by an interview.

For MTech, Eligible applicants will be asked to take an online admissions test. Shortlisted candidates will then be invited for an offlineTechnical Viva Voce, followed by an interview. applicants with a validGATE/ CSIR/ JESTscore in relevant fields are exempted from the admissions test and will be invited directly for the Technical Viva Voce round, followed by an interview.

Step 3: Document Verification:At the time of joining SSIHL, candidates need to submit a few documents that are Original Marks Certificate, Transfer Certificate, Conduct Certificate and Health record etc.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission at SSSIHL for MBA?

placement_report.college_name: Sri Sathya Sai Institute of Higher Learning Placement & Salary Insights

placement_data.title: SSSIHL Placement overview 2024
paragraphs: The placement report for Sri Sathya Sai Institute of Higher Learning (SSSIHL Anantpur) is not available on the official website. A total of 97 students were placed during SSSIHL MBA placements 2021.The median package offered to the MBA program was INR 5.50 LPA . The median package offered to BBA program was INR 2.77 LPA . The total number of students placed during SSSIHL placements for BBA was 24 .

faqs.question: What was the highest package offered at Sri Sathya Sai Institute of Higher Learning?
faqs.answer: The highest salary package offered was INR 10 LPA, the average salary package offered was 5 LPA and the lowest salary package offered was INR 3.5 LPA - 5.5 LPA. Unfortunately, no placements are offered for UG courses. After graduation, students have the option to continue higher studies which is either a PG or MBA programme. Most students choose to study MBA or M.Com. because it increases our chances of excelling in the future. Placements are offered through a catalyst program managed by Alumni of SSSIHL for outgoing PG students. They are trained and guided for the interviews. Companies like HDFC, Godrej properties, and Deloitte are the ones in which our seniors have been placed!

faqs.question: How are BSc placements at Sri Sathya Sai Institute of Higher Learning?
faqs.answer: First of all, SSIHL (Sri Sathya Sai Institute of Higher Learning) does not give you on-campus placement it gives you an opportunity for a Higher degree or Master's degree but you can go for off-campus. SSSIHL (Sri Sathya Sai Institute of Higher Learning) is a very reputable college. However, the alumni here are so strong in their jobs that they will take care of their students and this Institute has a really good name in society which makes employers look at us.

faqs.question: What are the career options after pursuing MBA from SSSIHL?
faqs.answer: After pursuing an MBA from SSSIHL or any other best MBA colleges in Andhra Pradesh , MBA candidates are in demand in almost every sector such as Retail and Corporate Sector, Banking and Financial Institutions, Media Industry, Hospitality sector, Education field, etc. Such candidates can work in some of the top recruiting companies in India such as Amazon, Google, Hindustan Unilever, Microsoft, Tata Administrative Services, Aditya Birla Group, Flipkart, etc.

faqs.question: What are the career options after BA Hons Economics from SSSIHL?
faqs.answer: After pursuing BA Hons Economics from SSSIHL or any other Economics colleges in Andhra Pradesh , students can work in major job profiles such as Chartered Accountant, Stockbroker, Investment analyst, Risk analyst, Income Tax Officer etc. Some of the major recruiting companies such as Accenture, Deloitte, KPMG, JP Morgan, Wipro and, Dell etc. hire the BA Economics graduates. Candidates who wish to make their career in the field of economics can check more about the career opportunities here .

cut_off.college_name: Sri Sathya Sai Institute of Higher Learning Cutoff 2025: Check NEET SS Round-Wise Cutoff Ranks

description: SSSIHL NEET SS cutoff 2025 is out for Round 1. The NBEMS has released the NEET SS cutoff for admission to Super Speciality courses, such as DM, DNB and MCh etc. The cutoff is available for different categories under the AI quota. For the General category students under the AI quota, the NEET SS 2025 cutoff ranged between 1179 and 2761, with DNB being the highly sought-after course for admission.

SSSIHL DNB cutoff 2025 ranged between 1179 and 2761 for the General category under the AI quota. With a lowest cutoff rank of 1179, DNB in Genito Urinary Surgery (Urology) turned out to be the most competitive specialisation for admission.
Students not eligible for this specialisation can also consider DNB in Cardiology with a lenient first-round cutoff rank of for admission.

Candidates appeared in the NEET SS entrance exam can refer to the table given below to view or download the consolidated round-wise cutoff PDFs. The cutoff PDFs are available round-wise for 2025, 2024 and 2023.

Candidates who appeared in the NEET SS entrance exam can refer to the table below for a comparative analysis of other specialisations available for admission at medical colleges that accept NEET SS for selecting students. The data below is for the General AI category students. Students can use the provided filters to choose other parameters, such as location, gender, and category, to do the comparison.

hostel_campus.college_name: Sri Sathya Sai Institute of Higher Learning Infrastructure Details & Reviews

facilities: 10+2 years of schooling from a recognised board and 3 years of university (total 15 years)
Either passed or appeared for Final exams at Bachelor’s degree level before the date of Admissions Tes

reviews.review_heading: Great campus and facilities in Sathya Sai but lacking in academic support for BA Department.
reviews.review_text:
The department was well equipped with smart boards and had a media library as well for any digital work. There was a huge library, which houses thousands of books ranging from any subject matter to any language. The science department also has well-equipped laboratories.
Talking about the hostel mess, I can guarantee that this hostel is the best hostel in terms of serving warm and sumptuous food along with so much love. There was never a day we would not look forward to the food. The campus life...

reviews.review_heading: An above-average college for B.Sc.
reviews.review_text: This college had an average infrastructure for our course. There were limited facilities, like labs for Physics and Chemistry, a library, Wi-Fi, etc., in our college. The college also provided hostel facilities to its students. The food in the hostel mess was of average quality.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty and good placements in 2016.
reviews.review_text: Our college is beautiful and Wi-Fi network facilities are available. Labs, classrooms and library are present. Canteen’s food is delicious and is of good quality. Medical facilities are available in the campus. Sports and games are interesting.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides high-quality teaching.
reviews.review_text: Lab facilities and Wi-Fi facilities are world-class here. The hostel is maintained hygienically, and the food served is tasty and nutritious. There are many in-house games competitions. There is also a dispensary in our hostel as well as in our institute. There are separate lab facilities with good infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Hostel food is good. All sorts of delicacies are served with love and care. Every week with special food was served twice. We have evening snacks daily in which we get to eat different food items. Our institute is well built with the required infrastructure like a library, labs, etc.

reviews.review_heading: It has a good infrastructure. It is totally worth studying here.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure provided by the college is excellent. Classrooms are spacious, and the seating arrangements are comfortable. There are computer labs and a Wi-Fi facility. The library is available. The hostel rooms are comfortable, and students get 3-4 sharing rooms. The food served is delicious every time. Students are encouraged to participate in various sports events. In the annual cultural sports meet, it is compulsory for every student to participate in at least one of the many events lik...

reviews.review_heading: The college provides value education with good career prospects.
reviews.review_text: The campus is newly constructed. The college was constructed in 2011 and the hostel in 2016. So, the infrastructure is good. The surroundings are very good, with flowers and plants. The evening walk is the best part of the life of a student here.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure, faculty and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities are fantastic. But the only thing is that they have to be availed under strict discipline and supervision. The quality of food, medical, sports and games facilities all are excellent. We have regular exercise timings, compulsory game timings as well as extracurricular activities as part of the course.

reviews.review_heading: A very good place for the overall development of students.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is basic and decent. We pay the minimal fee and get comparatively good infrastructure and facilities. Classrooms are equipped with projectors. The campus and playground are spacious. We have a basketball court. We have a multi-purpose hall which holds most of the indoor games. Hot water facilities are also provided.

reviews.review_heading: Students can get the experience for lifetime.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is world class. For sports and games, there is an international cricket stadium and also an international indoor stadium. The libraries have all that's necessary and even more. The hostel is like a home away from home. The food catered to all tastes as there are students from all over the country. There is a lot of diversity. There are people from almost all the states of our country and one or two from abroad as well.

reviews.review_heading: I am completely satisfied.
reviews.review_text: There were no electronic device allowed yet the infrastructure is really good over here. The laps are well designed and spacious, a huge library with different books, games and sports everyday, the quality and nutritious food in the campus was awesome.

reviews.review_heading: If you are looking a college which gives you overall personality development, this is a great clg to
reviews.review_text:
Institution has great infrastructure. Specialised English labs, Chemistry, physics and biosciences and food and nutrition labs. This institution is more like a gurukulam. Where you go and seek knowledge directly from the great scholars. So facilities never matter much. Many cultural events are conducted. No phones. So no Wi-Fi. All the sport activities are conducted and each every sport equipment is available. ( Both indoor and outdoor)
24*7 medical facilities. Hostel rooms- 6 in a room.

reviews.review_heading: The right place to build your personality from all aspects.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities will be provided inside the campus. The labs are sophisticated with all the new applications. Classrooms are very spacious with the limited number of students. Food will be provided in the hostel canteen facilities will not be there. The hostel rooms are too good with attached bathrooms. Infrastructure is too good if any issue arises it will be cleared within 2 days by the staff.

reviews.review_heading: Knowledge plus skills is equal to wisdom which is the very essence of the education.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is awesome. There is the multimedia facility, highly qualified and knowledgeable. The teaching staff is with the advanced skills. The departments are well-equipped. There are separate buildings, computer systems, advanced equipment, video conference classes from highly reputed lectures in the field from the different countries and areas of the field.

reviews.review_heading: Experience of a lifetime.
reviews.review_text:
Excellent facilities for science labs, extensive computer sessions to all the students, a big three-storey library in men's campus with various current journals, magazines and books that are maintained on a regular basis.
The university focuses on the integral development of the students and thus, a big indoor stadium and a huge outdoor ground are provided to conduct various sports events on a regular basis.
The students are given free, quality Medicare at Sri Sathya Sai general hospital through...

faqs.question: Does SCMS School of Technology and Management conduct on-campus placements?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: SCMS School of Technology and Management Kochi, offers programmes across the streams of Science, Commerce, and Management. Admission to all courses is based on merit obtained in the qualifying exam, along with valid entrance scores. Candidates must check the eligibility and fee as per their desired course on the official website before applying. SSTM Kerala Fee Structure varies from course to course. The common payable components for every course at SCMS School of Technology and Management are Tuition Fees, Security Deposit, Hostel Fee, etc. Find below the course-wise at SSTM Kochi:

faqs.answer: A:    The school offers courses in full-time mode. Candidates must fulfil the eligibility requirements to get admission in the school. SCMS SSTM considers national or state-level entrance test scores for MBA admission. The school conducts an entrance test for MCA programme. Students can check some of the course-wise eligibility from the table presented below:CourseCommon EligibilityMBABachelor's degree exam of MGU or equivalent university with at least 55% aggregateMCAAny graduation degree (BE/ BTech/ BSc/ BCom/ BA/ BVoc/ BCA, etc.) preferable with Mathematics at Class 12 or graduation level with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for reserved category)BCA (Hons)Class 12 or equivalent examination in Science stream with Mathematics/ Computer Science/ Information Practices as optionalBCom (Hons)Class 12 or equivalent exam recognised by MGU with Book-Keeping and Accountancy with any two out of the available optionsMScGraduation in relevant subjects with at least 50% aggregate
faqs.question: Who are eligible for SCMS School of Technology and Management?

faqs.answer: A:    Aspirants who have passed any graduation degree (BE/ BTech/ BSc/ BCom/ BA/ BVoc/ BCA, etc.) preferable with Mathematics at Class 12 or graduation level with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for reserved category) can apply for the SCMS School of Technology and Management MCA programme.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility for MCA at SCMS School of Technology and Management?

faqs.answer: A:    No, candidates must pass a bachelor's degree exam of MGU or equivalent university with at least 55% aggregate to apply for SCMS School of Technology and Management MBA programme. Besides, candidates who have passed master's degree exam of MGU or equivalent with at least 55% aggregate can also apply. Aspirants should hold the documents proving their eligibility for verification at the time of admission.
faqs.question: Can I apply for MBA at SCMS School of Technology and Management without graduation?

faqs.answer: A:    Candidates must pass Class 12 or equivalent examination in Science stream with Mathematics/ Computer Science/ Information Practices as optional to apply for SCMS School of Technology and Management BCA (Hons) programme. Aspirants must hold the documents proving their eligibility for verification at the time of admission.

review_summary.college_name: SCMS School of Technology and Management Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Integrated BCA + MCA - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good for those like to give more importance to academics than non academics.

content.Placements: Academic wise college is good, for non academically things like culturals, sports, and all are little bit low. Placements are a little bit low when compared to the previous year. The reason may be that the IT industry itself is a little bit down. Internship opportunities are coming more than placements. Overall, its good.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library are all available. Canteen food is good, but sports and games are not so satisfying. Overall, the quality of infrastructure is good, not too bad. Wi-Fi is always available. Labs and all are in good working conditions. There are about 3 to 4 labs. There are 2 libraries, 24X7 Wi-Fi is available, some class classrooms with AC and all.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: My review about this college.

content.Placements: Placements are pretty decent in our college, but there is still a lot of room for improvement. The average package offered is around 3.5 LPA, which is good. Many companies like HDFC, IDBI, ICICI, Deloitte, etc., some of the companies which visited our campus for financial profiles. I sat for these companies, so I can only tell about these companies. Placements are very good. Companies like Deloitte, Brinla, EY, and many other companies visit for recruitment frequently. Placement coordinators are excellent, they will guide and support every student.
content.Infrastructure: This college offers so many good programs and a two-year full-time MBA (Master of Business Administration). This program is approved by the All India Council for Technical Education. College provides hostel facility and the rooms are well-maintained, clean, and college also has rooms. AC rooms and non-AC rooms are available. Hostels have a dedicated mess that offers quality food.

individual_reviews.course: B.Com. in Computer Application - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Excellent and exclusive college for education.

content.Placements: Above 40% of students were placed in our course. Rs. 20,000- 40,000 was the average package offered in my course. The top recruiting company is Sebi. Mainly accountants were recruited. 20% of the total classmates got recruited. Top roles offered in the course were based work and assistant professor.
content.Infrastructure: The STEM building is very big. It is a very huge compound. The hostel resides inside the campus itself there's an ambulance in the college itself which is used in times of emergency and is very useful in times of need and usage. Intercollege games are conducted every year.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Good facilities are available.

content.Placements: More than 60 percent of students were placed in our college with the highest salary package of 13.4 lakhs per annum and the lowest salary package of 2.4 lakhs per annum. Few companies like Wipro, Cognizant, and IBM visited our college. Only 5 percent of students got internships in other sectors.
content.Infrastructure: Our college infrastructure is excellent, and good facilities are available like Wi-Fi, labs, library, classrooms, and separate departments for each block. Sports teams and games are conducted, medical facilities are available, and food quality is acceptable. The mess and canteen are very clean and hygienic.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Molecular Biology and Genetic Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Good college, and good facilities are available.

content.Placements: Totally, 95 percent of students got placed in our college with a good salary package of 9.8 lakhs per annum and the lowest salary package of 2.3 lakhs per annum. Few companies like IBM, Rooman, Wadhwani, and others visited our college. The top roles offered are microbiologist, research scientist, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Better infrastructure and facilities are available, such as Wi-Fi, labs, library, separate departments, and classrooms provided by our college. The food quality is acceptable, medical facilities are available, and sports and games are conducted. Cultural events are included.

admission_overview.college_name: SCMS School of Technology and Management Admission 2025: Fee, Eligibility, Application & Selection

admission_overview.title: SCMS SSTM Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: SCMS School of Technology and Management admissions are both merit and entrance-based. The school considers entrance exam scores for admission to MBA and MCA programmes. SCMS SSTM offers courses at UG, PG and doctoral levels in multiple streams such as Management, Computer Applications, Science, Commerce, etc. The school offers courses in affiliation with Mahatma Gandhi University. MBA is one of the popular courses of SSTM. Interested candidates can apply online for the preferred programme.

eligibility_selection.title: SCMS SSTM Eligibility & Selection 2025
eligibility_selection.description: The school offers courses in full-time mode. Candidates must fulfil the eligibility requirements to get admission to the school. SCMS SSTM considers national or state-level entrance test scores for MBA admission. The school conducts an entrance test for the MCA programme. Below are the SCMS SSTM courses along with their eligibility and selection criteria:

courses_table.eligibility: Bachelor's degree exam of MGU or equivalent university with at least 55% aggregate
Any graduation degree (BE/ BTech/ BSc/ BCom/ BA/ BVoc/ BCA, etc.), preferably with Mathematics at Class 12 or graduation level, with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for reserved category)
Class 12 or equivalent examination in the Science stream with Mathematics/ Computer Science/ Information Practices as an optional
Class 12 or equivalent exam recognised by MGU with Book-Keeping and Accountancy with any two out of the available options
Graduation in relevant subjects with at least 50% aggregate

faqs.answer: SCMS School of Technology and Management admissions are both merit and entrance-based. The school considers entrance exam scores for admission to MBA and MCA programmes. Students can check the detailed selection criteria for some of the courses:CourseSelection CriteriaMBAKMAT/ CMAT/ CAT + GDPIMCAMCA Entrance TestBCA (Hons)Merit-basedBCom (Hons)Merit-basedMScMerit-based
faqs.question: What is the course selection criteria at SCMS School of Technology and Management?

faqs.answer: The school offers courses in full-time mode. Candidates must fulfil the eligibility requirements to get admission in the school. SCMS SSTM considers national or state-level entrance test scores for MBA admission. The school conducts an entrance test for MCA programme. Students can check some of the course-wise eligibility from the table presented below:CourseCommon EligibilityMBABachelor's degree exam of MGU or equivalent university with at least 55% aggregateMCAAny graduation degree (BE/ BTech/ BSc/ BCom/ BA/ BVoc/ BCA, etc.) preferable with Mathematics at Class 12 or graduation level with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for reserved category)BCA (Hons)Class 12 or equivalent examination in Science stream with Mathematics/ Computer Science/ Information Practices as optionalBCom (Hons)Class 12 or equivalent exam recognised by MGU with Book-Keeping and Accountancy with any two out of the available optionsMScGraduation in relevant subjects with at least 50% aggregate
faqs.question: Who are eligible for SCMS School of Technology and Management?

paragraphs: SSTM admissions are currently open. Candidates are offered seat in the school based on their merit in the qualifying exam or entrance test. Aspirants must first apply for the preferred course to participate in the selection rounds. Below are the steps to get a seat in the school:
Step 1: SSTM Application Process 2025

The mode of application is online. Candidates first need to register with basic details to generate login credentials. Aspirants then need to login and fill out the application form. Candidates also need to pay an application fee to register for a course.
Step 2: Selection

The school shortlists candidates for MBA admission based on CAT, KMAT or CMAT scores. SSTM conducts an entrance test for MCA admission. For all other courses, the school selects candidates based on their merit in the last qualifying exam. Aspirants who are shortlisted for MBA have to further pass the personal interview round.
Step 3: Admission Confirmation
Once the selection process is over, the school sends an admission offer to shortlisted candidates. Further, aspirants need to confirm their seat by payingSSTM fee.

courses_data.name: SCMS SSTM MCA Admission 2025
courses_data.description: SCMS SSTM offers a two-year MCA programme divided into four semesters. Aspirants seeking admission to MCA courses must pass a bachelor's degree with a minimum of 50% aggregate with Mathematics at Class 12 or graduation level. The school conducts an entrance test to shortlisted candidates for MCA admission.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for MCA at SCMS School of Technology and Management?
faqs.answer: Aspirants who have passed any graduation degree (BE/ BTech/ BSc/ BCom/ BA/ BVoc/ BCA, etc.) preferable with Mathematics at Class 12 or graduation level with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for reserved category) can apply for the SCMS School of Technology and Management MCA programme.

faqs.question: Is MCA available at SCMS School of Technology and Management?
faqs.answer: Yes, SCMS SSTM offers a two-year MCA programme spread across four semesters. Aspirants must pass a bachelor's degree with a minimum of 50% aggregate with Mathematics at Class 12 or graduation level to apply for MCA. The school conducts an entrance test to select candidates for MCA admission.

courses_data.name: SCMS SSTM BCA (Hons) Admission 2025
courses_data.description: SCMS School of Technology and Management (SSTM) offers a three-year BCA (Hons) programme divided into six semesters. The school also offers an Integrated BCA + MCA programme at the UG level. Admission to BCA (Hons) and IMCA is based on the merit of the aspirants in the last qualifying exam. Candidates who have completed Class 12 or equivalent in Science stream with Mathematics, Computer Science, Information Practices as optional can apply for the BCA (Hons) course.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for BCA (Hons) at SCMS School of Technology and Management?
faqs.answer: Candidates must pass Class 12 or equivalent examination in Science stream with Mathematics/ Computer Science/ Information Practices as optional to apply for SCMS School of Technology and Management BCA (Hons) programme. Aspirants must hold the documents proving their eligibility for verification at the time of admission.

faqs.question: Who can apply for BCA course at SCMS School of Technology and Management?
faqs.answer: Candidates should complete Class 12 in Science stream. Aspirants should have Mathematics, Computer Science, or Informatics Practices must be a compulsory subject in their Class 12. Check the other eligibility criteria below:Higher Secondary Board of KeralaCBSEOr any similar qualifications recognised by M.G. University, Kottayam, Kerala.

courses_data.name: SCMS SSTM MBA Admission 2025
eligibility: Accepting Exams:MAT, ATMA, XAT, KMAT KERALA, CMAT, CAT
courses_data.description: SCMS School of Technology and Management (SSTM)offers a two-year MBA programme spread across four semesters. The school offers MBA at the PG level. Candidates who have completed their graduation from MGU or equivalent university with at least 50% aggregate can apply for the MBA programme. Admission to SCMS School of Technology and Management (SSTM) MBA is based on KMAT, CAT or CMAT scores followed by GDPI.

faqs.question: Can I apply for MBA at SCMS School of Technology and Management without graduation?
faqs.answer: No, candidates must pass a bachelor's degree exam of MGU or equivalent university with at least 55% aggregate to apply for SCMS School of Technology and Management MBA programme. Besides, candidates who have passed master's degree exam of MGU or equivalent with at least 55% aggregate can also apply. Aspirants should hold the documents proving their eligibility for verification at the time of admission.

faqs.question: How can I get admission in MBA at SCMS School of Technology and Management?
faqs.answer: SCMS School of Technology and Management admission to MBA programme is based on entrance exam scores. The school considers CMAT, CAT or KMAT scores for admission. Selected candidates are further called for group discussion and personal interview rounds. Shortlisted aspirants need to pay a course fee to confirm their seat.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission at SCMS SSTM?
faqs.answer: SCMS School of Technology and Management offers admission based on merit or entrance exam scores. The school considers KMAT, CAT or CMAT scores for admission to MBA programme. Candidates seeking admission in MCA course need to pass the entrance test conducted by SCMS SSTM. For all other programmes, selection is based on qualifying exam scores.

faqs.question: Can I get admission at SCMS SSTM with 60% in Class 12?
faqs.answer: Candidates need to complete Class 12 to apply for any of the UG programmes offered at SCMS School of Technology and Management. The minimum aggregate required for most of the UG courses is 45%. Hence, aspirants with 60% in Class 12 can get admission provided they also fulfil the selection requirements.

faqs.question: Is entrance exam required for admission at SCMS SSTM?
faqs.answer: Yes, SCMS School of Technology and Management considers entrance exam scores for MBA and MCA programmes. It is not compulsory for any other offered programmes. The school considers CAT, CMAT or KMAT for MBA and entrance test conducted by the school for MCA programme. Selected candidates have to further pass the group discussion and personal interview round for MBA.

placement_report.college_name: SCMS School of Technology and Management Placement & Salary Insights

placement_data.title: SCMS School of Technology and Management Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: SCMS School of Technology and Management has a placement cell that ensures placement assistance to every student. The institute invites companies from different sectors to conduct the placement process at the Campus premises. The placement cell is also responsible for conducting on-campus placement drives and organises a wide range of activities such as industry visits, live projects, workshops, mock interviews, and specialized training sessions.

SCMS School of Technology and Management concluded the placements for the Class of 2024. As per the latest report, the highest package offered during SCMS School of Technology and Management placements in 2024 was INR 10.58 LPA . Further, over 153 recruiters participated in 2024 placements and placed over 278 students of the 2024 batch of courses like MBA and MCA, etc. The top recruiters of SCMS School of Technology and Management in 2024 included Zynofus Technologies, Zafin, Vanenburg, ULTS, TCS, KPMG, Intellipaat, EY, Deloitte, Asian Paints, American Express, Aditya Birla Capital, Innovature, etc.
Note : The placement year is not mentioned on the official website. Hence, the placement data mentioned above is assumed for the year 2024 .

This program is approved by the All India Council for Technical Education. College provides hostel facility and the rooms are well-maintained, clean, and college also has rooms. AC rooms and non-AC rooms are available. Hostels have a dedicated mess that offers quality food.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent and exclusive college for education.
reviews.review_text: The STEM building is very big. It is a very huge compound. The hostel resides inside the campus itself there's an ambulance in the college itself which is used in times of emergency and is very useful in times of need and usage. Intercollege games are conducted every year.

reviews.review_heading: Good facilities are available.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is excellent, and good facilities are available like Wi-Fi, labs, library, classrooms, and separate departments for each block. Sports teams and games are conducted, medical facilities are available, and food quality is acceptable. The mess and canteen are very clean and hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: Good college, and good facilities are available.
reviews.review_text: Better infrastructure and facilities are available, such as Wi-Fi, labs, library, separate departments, and classrooms provided by our college. The food quality is acceptable, medical facilities are available, and sports and games are conducted. Cultural events are included.

reviews.review_heading: Enjoy life peacefully and make memories.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is better compared to other colleges. The college has the best Wi-Fi facility and clean washrooms and classrooms, and projectors in it. The labs are well-equipped, and the sports room is also full of the equipment required for sports.

reviews.review_heading: The best MBA college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good, with an excellent basketball court, table tennis facilities, and other sports amenities. The campus has a stationary store, but more stores are needed. The campus life is exciting and stressful at the same time. AC classrooms are available, and drinking water options include normal, hot, and cold water. Facilities for studying, like the library and e-books, are helpful. The hostel is big, with 2 and 4-person sharing rooms, but there is no parking facility, and some ro...

reviews.review_heading: Good placements in 2023, friendly faculties and good facilities. Dissatisfied by college events.
reviews.review_text: The campus is a very small area but is beautiful and maintained neatly. Hostel facilities are good and there are no restrictions, although the food is bad at times. SCMS provides a good library and labs with Wi-Fi and the classroom contains smartboards and armchairs.

reviews.review_heading: Studies is all that you looking for, This is it.
reviews.review_text: Basic infrastructure is pretty good. There are various libraries, canteen, basketball court. AC classrooms are available for postgraduate students. Since I am a computer Science student, the computer lab is decent it has centralized AC and all. All together, infrastructure-wise, SSTM is pretty good. The girls hostel is situated inside of the college campus, and it has received decent reviews. The boys hostel is 1.4 km away from the campus, and it got average review from students.

reviews.review_heading: Scms placement, facilities,  etc.
reviews.review_text: Good facilities like Wi-Fi, computer lab, sports area are there where hostel students can play. There are canteen facilities with lots of variety food like cutlet, brownies, friend rice, noodles, toffies, etc. Big area for stage which is for cocurricular activities.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for students.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities were very good. Our campus was huge. The food served in the hostel was decent.

reviews.review_heading:
Good placements but average infrastructure
.
reviews.review_text:
Wi-Fi facilities are available, Labs are decent, classrooms are boring, library is good. Hostel facilities are not good according to what my friends told me because the warden is strict and don't allow you to go out at night and the food is not very reliable because several times they suffered food poisoning. Medical facilities like sick room is available
Sports and games are some what available.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best colleges.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college and hostel is good. The hostel staff members are good. The hostel rooms are good. The interior of the hostel is good. Wi-Fi facility is available in the hostel. Our college has a canteen. They provide food 3 times a day. The food served in the hostel is good.

reviews.review_heading: There are very poor infrastructure and facilities. It focuses more on studies.
reviews.review_text: There are very poor facilities here. Poor quality food is available in the mess of the college hostel, and it always serves cold food. The best food items available here are appam and egg curry. For sports, only a basketball court is available, and there are no other courts. There is no period for recreational activities. Toilets are not clean.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with good placements provided by the college.
reviews.review_text: The campus is fully air-conditioned. Wi-Fi facility is available in both college and hostel. The canteen facility is neat. Classrooms are neat and structured. Our college provides the best infrastructure and facilities. The campus is environment friendly.

college_info.intro:
JIET Group of Institutions offers UG, PG, diploma, and PhD courses across various streams such as Engineering, Design, Nursing, Management, Computer Application, and others. BTech, BDes and MBA are the flagship courses offered at the institute.
JIET Group of Institutions offers a four-year, full-time BTech programme across various specialisations such as Civil, Electrical, Mechanical, CSE, Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, Cyber Security, and others. The MBA programme offered by the JIET Group of Institutions is a two-year programme. It is offered in several specialisations, including HR, Marketing, Business Intelligence, Hospital Management, and others. The below-mentioned are JIET Group of Institutions' popular programmes:

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Balanced campus with good placements and supportive faculty.

content.Placements: Placements at JIET for B.Teach CSE are generally good. Many companies visit the campus for campus recruitment, including TCS, Wipro, Infosys, Capgemini, and some product-based companies. Average packages are around 4-5 LPA, with some students getting higher, 8-12 LPA, in good companies.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is well developed. Labs and classrooms are well-equipped computer labs with updated systems and internet. The library has a good collection of technical books. The campus is Wi-Fi enabled, a green campus, and sports facilities are available. We have decent hostel facilities with furnished rooms.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning (Lateral Entry) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Supportive faculty, good placements, and active campus life.

content.Placements: The B.Tech in AI & ML, with the passing out batch of 2027, has shown strong placement outcomes. 80 to 85% of students have been placed, The highest package offered is 18 to 20 LPA, the average package offered is 6 to 7LPA, and the lowest package offered is 3 to 4 LPA. Top recruiters are Microsoft, Google, Amazon, Deloitte, TCS, Infosys, Accenture, Wipro, and Capgemini. 70 to 75% students also got AI startups internships, with Amazon, Microsoft, Deloitte, Infosys, TCS, and startups in Healthcare, FinTech, EdTech. Top Roles offered are ML Engineer, Data Scientist, AI Engineer, SDE, Data Analyst, NLP Engineer, CV Engineer, and AI Research Intern.

The top roles offered in my course are software developer, web developer, business analyst, software tester, system engineer, and trainee engineer.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: JIET: Life as an engineer.

content.Placements: College placements are quite good as many top companies like Amazon, Infosys, Google, etc., come to JIET to conduct interviews, etc. Students who perform well get good opportunities. The placement criteria are good. The highest package is 33 LPA and the lowest package is 3 LPA. Many students got internships in B.Tech and in many top companies as well.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure are good both in the department and hostel. Wi-Fi is available 24 hours and labs are equipped with the latest tech. Classrooms and the library are comfortable and have a quiet environment to study in. The food in the mess is acceptable to eat but not extraordinarily the best. JIET has its own hospital there. Medical facilities are the best for students as well as their parents. It provides both indoor as well as outdoor games.

admission_overview.college_name: JIET Group of Institutions Admission 2025: Eligibility, Courses, Fees and Admission Process 2025

admission_process.title: JIET Group of Institutions Admissions Process 2025

paragraphs: JIET Group of Institutions Group of Institutions admissionsare entrance-based.JIET Group of Institutionsoffers undergraduate, postgraduate, and research programmes and the courses include BTech, MTech, MBA, BSc, BDes, PhD, etc. The flagship programmes offered at JIET Group of Institutions includeBTech, BDes, UG Diploma and MBA, among others. The UG and PG courses offered at this college range between two to four years. Admission to the JIET Group of Institutions Group of Institutions is based on the respective entrance exams. Some of the entrance exams accepted at this college include MAT, XAT, CAT, ATMA and JEE Main.Candidates can check theJodhpur Institute of Engineering and Technology courses, eligibility criteria and other details below-

Candidates interested in getting into the Jodhpur Institute of Engineering and Technology are required to follow the entrance exam and college application process. Check out the below table for details onJIET Group of Institutions course admissionwhich is inclusive of its eligibility & selection:
JIET Group of Institutions course admissions 2025 for all of its courses are done based on merit and on entrance exams. Check below the complete JIET Group of Institutions admission process:
Step 1 - Application Process:

The mode of application is online. Candidates must register online and then fill out the online application form by visiting the official website of the Jodhpur Institute of Engineering and Technology
Step 2 - Selection rounds:
The candidate should get a valid score in entrance testsJEE Main/REAP/GATE/MAT/XAT/CAT/ATMA/NCHMCT JEE.Candidates have to appear for the counselling process, depending on the course chosen.
Step 3 - Admission confirmation:

Once the selection rounds are done, the shortlisted candidates are called for document verification. Based on academic performance, scores in the entrance tests, and performance in the selection process, admission will be granted. For the final admission, the candidates need to pay theJIET Group of Institutions Fee.

Steps for JIET Group of Institutions Admission Process 2025

courses_data.name: JIET Group of Institutions BTech Admission 2025
courses_data.description: JIET Group of Institutions provides admission to BE/BTech, MBA, BSc, BDes, and MTech courses on the basis of entrance examinations such as JEE Main, REAP, GATE, etc. Aspirants have to apply online and pass the applicable exams or merit standards, then they go through counselling and document verification.

faqs.question: What entrance exams are accepted for BTech admission at JIET Group of Institutions?
faqs.answer: JIET Group of Institutions accepts scores of JEE Main and REAP for admission to its BE/BTech courses.These tests are employed to determine the candidate's suitability and merit for engineering courses. Entry is provided through a counselling system based on the marks scored on these tests. Candidates need to fulfill the minimum eligibility requirement prior to applying via these entrance examinations.

faqs.question: What is the minimum eligibility for applying to the BTech programme at JIET Group of Institutions?
faqs.answer: To be eligible to apply to JIET Group of Institutions BTech course, the candidate should have passed Class 12 from a recognised board. They must have obtained a minimum of 45% aggregate marks in the entrance exam. The subjects that have to be studied are Physics and Mathematics with one of Chemistry, Biology, or Biotechnology. Eligibility is required before sitting in entrance exams such as JEE Main or REAP for admissions.

faqs.question: How costly is JIET Group of Institutions?
faqs.answer: JIET Group of Institutions offers UG, PG, and Diploma courses. The institute offers an affordable fee structure for the courses. The table below has the fees for various courses at JIET Group of Institutions:Course NameFeesBTechINR 2.57 L - 3.42 LBDesINR 3.42 LMBAINR 1.62 LMTechINR 1.71 L - 1.77 L

faqs.question: How can I prepare for BTech admission at JIET Group of Institutions?
faqs.answer: JIET Group of Institutions BTech course admission is based on merit and entrance exams. The institute accepts national entrance exams such as JEE Main and others. Further, candidates seeking admission to the BTech programme must be Class 12 passed with 45% (40% for students belongs to the reserved category).

courses_data.name: JIET Group of Institutions MBA Admission 2025

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria to apply for the MBA programme at JIET Group of Institutions BTech Admission 2025?
faqs.answer: In order to take admission in the MBA programme at JIET Group of Institutions BTech Admission 2025, a bachelor's degree with a minimum aggregate of 50% marks from a recognised university is a must. Apart from this, they should also have a valid score in any of the management entrance exams like MAT, XAT, CAT, or ATMA.

faqs.question: What is the admission process of JIET?
faqs.answer: Admissions to all courses offered by Jodhpur Institute of Engineering and Technology for the year 2024 are based on merit and entrance exams. The complete admission process is described below:Step 1 - Application Process:Candidates are required to register online and fill out the application form by visiting the official website of Jodhpur Institute of Engineering and Technology.Step 2 - Selection rounds:Candidates must obtain a valid score in one of the entrance tests such as JEE Main, REAP, GATE, MAT, XAT, CAT, ATMA, or NCHMCT JEE. Depending on the chosen course, candidates have to attend the counseling process.Step 3 - Admission confirmation:Once the selection process is completed, shortlisted candidates will be called for document verification. Admission will be granted based on academic performance, scores in the entrance tests, and performance in the selection process.

placement_data.title: JIET Group of Institutions Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: In 2024, JIET Group of Institutions placed a total of 213 students, out of which 192 belonged to undergraduate courses like BCA, BSc, BTech , and many others and 21 were from postgraduate programs like MBA , MTech , etc. The estimated placement rate recorded during JIET Group of Institutions placements was 75%. In all 200 companies participated in the 2024 placement drive at JIET Group of Institutions. JIET Group of Institutions has released its highest package for 2025 which stood at INR 18 LPA. Whereas in 2024 the highest package was INR 11 LPA.

hostel_campus.college_name: JIET Group of Institutions Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Jodhpur Institute of Engineering and Technology, JIET Group of InstitutionsReviewed on 5 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Balanced campus with good placements and supportive faculty.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is well developed. Labs and classrooms are well-equipped computer labs with updated systems and internet. The library has a good collection of technical books. The campus is Wi-Fi enabled, a green campus, and sports facilities are available. We have decent hostel facilities with furnished rooms.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Jodhpur Institute of Engineering and Technology, JIET Group of InstitutionsReviewed on 17 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Supportive faculty, good placements, and active campus life.
reviews.review_text: The AI & ML department has Wi-Fi-enabled, smart classrooms, dedicated AI/ML labs with high performance systems, and a well stocked library with online resources, IEEE, Springer, NPTEL, etc. Hostels are clean and Wi-Fi enabled, with decent living space. The mess provides hygienic and nutritious food, while the canteen offers snacks and fast food. The campus has a health center with medical staff and tie ups with a nearby hospital. Sports facilities include grounds, courts, a gym, and indoor game...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Jodhpur Institute of Engineering and Technology, JIET Group of InstitutionsReviewed on 4 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: This college is good and located in Jodhpur.
reviews.review_text: My department has a library, Wi-Fi connections, clean washrooms, and good labs, but not all lecture theaters have air conditioning. The hostels are good, and the food quality is average. The food quality in the canteen is very good. Medical facilities are good because my college also has a hospital, and it's good for both games and sports students.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Jodhpur Institute of Engineering and Technology, JIET Group of InstitutionsReviewed on 5 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Solid infrastructure and campus life, decent placements, but civil needs more industry exposure.
reviews.review_text: Our college has 24X7 high-speed Wi-Fi, labs, and specialized labs. We have one main big central library along with 8 departmental libraries. Boys and girls have separate hostels. Rooms include almirahs, fans, and lights. You can get AC facilities also along with balcony. We have proper security. It also offers cafeteria and has pure veg mess. Gym and sports are also available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Jodhpur Institute of Engineering and Technology, JIET Group of InstitutionsReviewed on 21 May 2025)
reviews.review_heading: JIET: Life as an engineer.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are good both in the department and hostel. Wi-Fi is available 24 hours and labs are equipped with the latest tech. Classrooms and the library are comfortable and have a quiet environment to study in. The food in the mess is acceptable to eat but not extraordinarily the best. JIET has its own hospital there. Medical facilities are the best for students as well as their parents. It provides both indoor as well as outdoor games.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Jodhpur Institute of Engineering and Technology, JIET Group of InstitutionsReviewed on 19 May 2025)
reviews.review_heading: I suggest everyone not to take admission in this college.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for our course are below average because classrooms are not properly maintained, and in some classrooms, honeybees often attack through the windows. There are no ACs in the classrooms, making it very difficult to stay in class during summer. Talking about hostels, they are also not well maintained and not properly cleaned.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Jodhpur Institute of Engineering and Technology, JIET Group of InstitutionsReviewed on 5 May 2025)
reviews.review_heading: If any students are not selected in IIT or NIT these students are not gone.
reviews.review_text: In college, all classroom and lab are well and good maintain. Faculty members are good. Hostel facilities are also good and provide good quality food in mess. Overall, hostel facilities are good and rooms are good. AC facilities are also available at this college.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Jodhpur Institute of Engineering and Technology, JIET Group of InstitutionsReviewed on 20 Feb 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure but sometimes lack in management of activities satisfied with college.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are good. In my point of view they only lack sports facilities. There is no good ground to play football or cricket. Canteen food is good but mess food can sometimes become horrible. The Wi-Fi speed and library are also average.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Jodhpur Institute of Engineering and Technology, JIET Group of InstitutionsReviewed on 22 Jan 2025)
reviews.review_heading: JIET college a review by student.
reviews.review_text: College has a huge campus divided into 2 parts, South and North campus where different departments are situated and huge grounds and separate canteen for each campus. I don't have much knowledge about hostels because I'm a day scholar and we are back home after college is over.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Jodhpur Institute of Engineering and Technology, JIET Group of InstitutionsReviewed on 15 Jan 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It's worth this value, so go for it.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure of the college are good. The campus is not that big, but Wi-Fi is available at every corner of the college. Smart classrooms and labs are there, and a central library is available, which includes almost all books. Faculty in my college are friendly and helpful in nature.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Jodhpur Institute of Engineering and Technology, JIET Group of InstitutionsReviewed on 30 Dec 2024)
reviews.review_heading: I like my college very much, the faculty here is also very good.
reviews.review_text: My college hostel is very best and clean. Our college sports ground is very large, and all sports activities are available. The medical faculty is also very good, available even at night. The food in the canteen is also very good. The library is very clean and quiet.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Jodhpur Institute of Engineering and Technology, JIET Group of InstitutionsReviewed on 29 Nov 2024)
reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with college faculty members but dissatisfied with placement and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college labs, classrooms, and library are good, but Wi-Fi quality and network are very bad.  Canteen food is very good and hygienic, but our mess food is not that good. Sometimes food is good but not best, and sometimes the food is hard to swallow.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Jodhpur Institute of Engineering and Technology, JIET Group of InstitutionsReviewed on 29 Nov 2024)
reviews.review_heading: JIET Jodhpur and its insights.
reviews.review_text: KBT College of Engineering has an open library with a good internet connection. which connections can only be accessed by a user ID provided to each student. College also has a very nice cafeteria. Our college organises number of sports events, which help in developing personal health.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Jodhpur Institute of Engineering and Technology, JIET Group of InstitutionsReviewed on 29 Nov 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Review of Jodhpur Institute of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of our hostel is very good. Rooms are clean and warden is very helpful and kind to everyone. We have a fabulous mess and food is excellent. There are four canteens and students are treated like their own children.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Jodhpur Institute of Engineering and Technology, JIET Group of InstitutionsReviewed on 28 Nov 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Good faculty, placement, infrastructure, scholarships for some students, and good hostel facilities.
reviews.review_text: Hostel is in good condition and clean. Hostel facilities are also good compared to its facilities. Wi-Fi is installed in all hostels, and mess food is decent. Volleyball, football, and cricket are played in the hostel. Friends are good. Warden sir is also nice.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: Overall, an average college for the BBA course.

review_content.Placements: 40-55% of students get placements at our college in this course. The highest placement package offered was 12 LPA, and the lowest package was 3 LPA. The average placement package offered in this course was 3-7 LPA. Top recruiters were from management firms. Around 60% of students got internship opportunities.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure for our course and hostel was good enough. The quality of facilities offered in our course was good, and these facilities include the library, labs, Wi-Fi, etc. The quality of the hostel was also good. The food in both the hostel mess and canteen was good to eat. The college also provides various sports facilities to the students.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.A. in Economics - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with teachers and infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Many students are placed based on their personality, knowledge, and grades. Top recruiting companies like ICICI Bank, HDFC Bank, etc., visit our campus. Our college has foreign academic membership with universities like Harrisburg University and many other colleges.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available in the library and hostel. The mess and canteen are good. Facilities for sports like basketball, badminton, etc., are available. A small gym is also available.
review_content.Faculty: Our teachers are well-qualified, helpful, and knowledgeable. They give personal attention to every student. The course curriculum is relevant. Exams are average.

Bachelor of Arts is a 3 year program. It can be pursued full-time, part-time, or through distance learning.Click to know aboutBA Subjects and Specialisations.
faqs.question: Q: What are the subjects taught in BA?

faqs.answer: The best choice depends on your career aspirations:· If you want to become a teacher: Opt for a B.Ed. It's the mandatory qualification for teaching in most schools.· If you want to pursue a career in research or a science-related field: A BSc would be more suitable. It provides a strong foundation for further studies and specialised careers.· If you're unsure: Consider your interests and skills. Do you enjoy teaching and interacting with students? overview_faqs.answer: St. Bede's College is a renowned institution offering M.A, M.Sc, M.Com, B.A, B.Sc, BBA, B.Com, BCA, D.El.Ed. Students can choose these courses to embark on their careers in the field of Humanities & Social Sciences, Science, Accounting & Commerce, Arts ( Fine / Visual / Performing ), Design, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software, Teaching & Education. The institute is staffed with highly skilled and experienced faculty members dedicated to delivering these programs. review_summary.college_name: St. Bede's College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.A. (Hons.) in English - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: About the college and the infrastructure.

content.Placements: Around 40% of students get placed every year. The highest package offered is 3 LPA, and the lowest is 1 LPA. BSNL visited the campus for recruitment. A few students were able to secure internships. Managerial roles were among the top roles offered, with HR being the most common.
content.Infrastructure: College has everything you need. High-speed Wi-Fi is available 24/7. The labs are in good condition, and all the computers work properly. The Wi-Fi speed is reliable, and the quality of the equipment is good. The labs are newly built and well-maintained.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: College faculty and management are qualified.

content.Placements: In our college, 25-30% of students get placements in the course. The highest placement package offered was 8 LPA. The lowest package offered was 2 LPA. The average package offered was 3 LPA. Top recruiters were XSl, TechLabs, etc. In our college. Top roles offered in our course were HR, accountants, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure for our course was good. The college had a big and pretty campus. The campus of the college had a positive environment and lush greenery. Wi-Fi, labs, library, canteen, hostel, etc. facilities were available in our college. Sports facilities were also given in our college.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: Overall, an average college for the BBA course.

content.Placements: 40-55% of students get placements at our college in this course. The highest placement package offered was 12 LPA, and the lowest package was 3 LPA. The average placement package offered in this course was 3-7 LPA. Top recruiters were from management firms. Around 60% of students got internship opportunities.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure for our course and hostel was good enough. The quality of facilities offered in our course was good, and these facilities include the library, labs, Wi-Fi, etc. The quality of the hostel was also good. The food in both the hostel mess and canteen was good to eat. The college also provides various sports facilities to the students.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. in Economics - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with teachers and infrastructure.

content.Placements: Many students are placed based on their personality, knowledge, and grades. Top recruiting companies like ICICI Bank, HDFC Bank, etc., visit our campus. Our college has foreign academic membership with universities like Harrisburg University and many other colleges.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available in the library and hostel. The mess and canteen are good. Facilities for sports like basketball, badminton, etc., are available. A small gym is also available.
content.Faculty: Our teachers are well-qualified, helpful, and knowledgeable. They give personal attention to every student. The course curriculum is relevant. Exams are average.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. in History - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Glad to be a BEDIAN as the college helps you become a better version of yourself overtime.

content.Placements: There are very few opportunities for placements. Students are mostly placed in aviation companies. In batch 2020, very few students got internships, approximately 10%. Although there must have been other placements in different departments that I may not be aware of.
content.Infrastructure: Bede's offer a great environment when it comes to academics. It offers complete assistance by the professors at all times. The library has a good collection of books for every subject. Also, there is a book bank, that allows students to reuse old books instead of being new ones. These can be issued for the entire semester. Hostellers were pretty happy there as the accommodation, food, outings, discipline, extracurricular activities, etc. Were excellent and the college lies in the lap of nature giving you positive vibes.

These can be issued for the entire semester. Hostellers were pretty happy there as the accommodation, food, outings, discipline, extracurricular activities, etc. Were excellent and the college lies in the lap of nature g...

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with helpful staff and good study environment.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is pretty much reasonable because of the location. It is located in Navbhaar, Shimla. There are a good number of classes in good condition. The best part about the infrastructure is library. It has every kind of book and study material including a book bank. Library is very clean and well-maintained. Smart classes are available but need to be doubled. Hostel quality is good quality but it gets a bit difficult during winter but it's more than bearable. Food available in...

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good teaching staff members and location.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good and adequate for the college crowd. The college has one of the best libraries known with an archive that dates back to the 18th century. The hostel isn't the best. It's expensive for what is available in the college with many restrictions. Apart from this, the food is good compared to other hostels.

reviews.review_heading: Our college offers the best in the least.
reviews.review_text: The campus environment is very refreshing and good. It offers one of the richest libraries, a basketball court, a canteen and a very scenic pathway. Our college is surrounded by pine trees. A beautiful old campus building is the best for the students.

reviews.review_heading: There is a lot of scope for improvement in every way. Teachers here ranges from poor to average.
reviews.review_text: The equipment is rather more important than the overall infrastructure, which is not best in our college as a college can provide. They need improvement, and chemistry labs are not at all equipped properly. Physics labs are fine, and I don't have any idea about other labs.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with good infrastructure and good teachers.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure in our course are very good. Wi-Fi facility is available, and classrooms are clean. Quality of the food served in the hostel is good. The hostel is clean. Medical facilities are available. Sport is an important part of our college. The college provides every game like chess, basketball, etc.

reviews.review_heading: The best college. Although our principal is not that good, our teachers and atmosphere are good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college was beautiful. The surroundings of the campus were filled with trees all over. There is a beautiful long path which leads to the main college campus and the hostel. Weather in Shimla is beautiful all the time, and the snowfall in winters add to the beauty of college. There won't be an any better college in Himachal as far as the infrastructure is concerned. The food served was okay. Our college provides Wi-Fi facilities both on campus as well as in the hostels. ...

reviews.review_heading: Being a graduate from this college was an average experience,faculty was good but not the placements
reviews.review_text: The college had a good Wi-Fi facility. The library had sufficient books for students including e-books. There were various sports like basketball, badminton, etc. in the college. The quality of food in the canteen was average. The hostel food was average with limited varieties-one vegetable/dal was served during lunch and dinner.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the three years spent at this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. The college provides Wi-Fi facility at campus and hostel. The best part of college is the library. The classrooms and labs are okay. There is a single canteen in the college, and it is crowded most of the times. The hostel infrastructure is good. Thevenet block c...

reviews.review_heading: Provides quality education.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available are good. The college provides you with a library and also a seminar room. Every classroom has a smart board, which makes teaching easier and more interesting. We also have a language lab for English students. Overall, the infrastructure is good.

reviews.review_heading: Not a college for ambitious fighters.
reviews.review_text: The college library is an absolute winner, it has antique books ageing from 1600. The quality of furniture, labs, and the auditorium is low. Although the hostel building is one of the most beautiful ones, the basic amenities for girls are lacking in winters.
