review_summary.college_name: Sree Dattha Institute of Pharmacy Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The way to college is entering a new lifestyle.

content.Placements: 95% of the outgoing batch is going to appear for college placements. The minimum annual package starts from 9 to 17 LPA. The maximum annual package is 18 to 24 LPA. Apollo, HCL, ADPT Private Limited, TCS, etc. 78% of students from the B Pharmacy got internships last year. 80% of students from the Pharma.D got internships last year.
content.Faculty: Some habits of extraordinary teachers include being flexible, organized, and lifelong learners. They also communicate, collaborate, build relationships, and observe colleagues. To pass the examination in any subject, the minimum passing for any component (head) is 40%, subject to a 50% aggregate requirement for semester passing. The institution provides coaching in English communication, remedial coaching for academically weak students, special training in pharmacy equipment handling for UG and PG students, student mentoring for all course students, and hospital and clinical training for Pharma D & Pharma D (PB) students.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I am absolutely satisfied with the college faculty.

content.Placements: On my campus, about 80-90% of students get placed. The highest package is 19 LPA, and the average package is 2 LPA for my course. Top recruiting companies for my course on my campus are Dr. Reddy's Labs, Medplus, multinational companies, and Zandu Balm. Students have to find an internship by themselves, as no campus internships are being provided. Top roles provided are drug inspector, food inspector, pharmacist, medical coder, scientist, and researcher.
content.Infrastructure: No on-time facilities provided. The outside infrastructure is good, but the inside infrastructure is old. There is no Wi-Fi, but the labs are good. The classrooms are old, the library is very big, and it has a huge number of books. I didn't take a hostel because of its high cost. Sports and games are available at the college.

individual_reviews.course: Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D.) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I am absolutely satisfied due to the students' and teachers' friendly behavior.

content.Placements: In our college, about 90 percent of students got placements. Most of the students are happy with our college, which also offers post-graduation. For pharmacy, it is the best college, including for placements.
content.Infrastructure: Free Wi-Fi and well-maintained labs make the environment conducive. All areas are kept clean, and the library is vast, considering the location. Classrooms are spacious for students' comfort and infrastructure. The main attraction is the pharmacy block in the institution.
content.Faculty: In my opinion, exams are tough because pharmacy is not easy to clear. However, exams become easier with good reading and practice. Each semester, faculty members are available and well-experienced in the college, providing quality teaching.

individual_reviews.course: Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college for studying and for placements.

content.Placements: Almost 75% of students got placed. The highest salary package offered is Rs. 50,000, and the lowest salary package offered is Rs. 20,000 per month. Yes, there was recruiting of 25%members got internships from our course, and some of them got into the global hospital. A clinical pharmacist is a top role in our course. It is the main course which is best for other countries.
content.Infrastructure: There is Wi-Fi, but only faculty will use it. The classrooms are best and maintained neatly. We have a small library which we can use. Food is below average. Tiffins are somewhat better. The canteen is vast, and it contains bakery items. We have sports and games.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely great college faculty,placements are great and really good infrastructure and facilities

content.Placements: 70% of students get placed in our course. The highest is 2 lac/annum, the average is 1.5 lac/annum, the lowest is 1.2 lac/annum. Apollo is the top recruiting company for our course.60% of students got internship in our course. Top roles offered is pharmacist in our course.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure is very good in our department Wi-Fi is provided with high-speed, labs are very good with all equipment required. Classrooms are wide and provided ventilation very well, the library has all the books we need. The quality of food is very good medical facilities are very well arranged, sports and games also conducted frequently.

reviews_list.review_title: Smt. Tarawati institute for B.Pharma, M.Pharma, and D.Pharma courses.

review_content.Placements: All students at our place are in very good companies. The average package offers about 2.5 lacs per year. Many companies, like Sun Pharma, Tornado Pharma, Alkem Pharmaceutical, Manufacture, and other pharmaceutical companies, require a B.Pharma or a minimum pharma degree.
review_content.Infrastructure: Labs and classes are very well furnished. The library is quite good. We take many books for reading for educational purposes. The college also provides Wi-Fi facilities for students. The quality of all the facilities provided by Smt. Tarawati Institute College is quite good.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is well-established and well-affiliated with various authorities.

review_content.Placements: Good placements are available in our college. Many top companies like Cipla, Mankind, Akums, etc., offer jobs for students. About 70% of students got an internship in our course. The main role is to make a good drug that is helpful for people and helps to treat them.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is very good. It provides many facilities like Wi-Fi and a library. It has a good laboratory to do experiments on drugs. From time to time, medical camps are also organised to check the health of students. Blood donation camps are also occurred. Sports facilities are also provided.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Pharmacy (D.Pharma.) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: The building is small but this college is good. There is no discrimination of any kind.

review_content.Placements: Around 56 students were placed in this course, and no packages were given to the students, but this college helps to provide jobs in various pharmacy-related jobs such as industries, hospitals, etc. In the last batch, they also provided jobs to last year's students.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is all kind of laboratories available which are required to practice pharmacy subjects such as pharmaceutical chemistry pharmacology, pharmacognosy, pharmaceutics, and so on. The library is also available with many books related to and unrelated to the pharmacy. The quality of the food is good at the canteen, and sports are also available to play on Saturday.

description: Rainbow Children's Hospital and Birthright cutoff 2024 for NEET SS is available on this page for admission to super speciality courses. The cutoff was released as opening and closing ranks for different categories of students belonging to the AI quota. Candidates seeking admission can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the Rainbow Children's Hospital and Birthright NEET SS cutoff 2024 for different courses, specialisations and categories. A few more updates are below:

Rainbow Children's Hospital and Birthright NEET SS cutoff 2025 is out for Round 1. The NBEMS has released the NEET SS cutoff for admission to Super Speciality courses, such as DM, DNB and MCh etc. The cutoff is available for different categories under the AI quota. For the General category students under the AI quota, the NEET SS 2025 cutoff ranged between 18 and 1357, with DNB being the highly sought-after course for admission.

Rainbow Children's Hospital and Birthright DNB cutoff 2025 ranged between 18 and 1357 for the General category under the AI quota. With a lowest cutoff rank of 18, DNB in Paediatric Neurology turned out to be the most competitive specialisation for admission.
Students not eligible for this specialisation can also consider DNB in Pediatric Intensive Care with a lenient first-round cutoff rank of for admission.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Dr K.N Modi University offers a wide range of programmes at both UG and PG levels. With option for Full Time learning, students can choose from several streams such as Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences and Business & Management Studies. At the UG stage, courses available include B.E. / B.Tech, B.Sc. and BCA. For the PG level, there is a wide range of courses like M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and M.Sc. Dr K.N Modi University fee structure ranges between INR 15,000 to 3,60,000.

review_content.General: The thing that impressed me the most is how serious the university offers a balanced education. The sports facilities are wonderful, with special grounds for cricket, volleyball, and basketball, as well as indoor sports such as chess, table tennis, and badminton. The campus has facilities like a canteen, laboratories, webinar room, auditorium, and hygienic classrooms with projectors. Although I do hope that the washrooms are in a cleaner condition - that is an area they can improve upon. The condition of washrooms is not much good. The hostels are well serviced and comfortable.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Didn't match my standards.

review_content.Placements: I have 30 students in my course. The highest package in my course is around 10 LPA to 20 LPA, and the lowest is around 4 LPA. Companies that recruit BCA students are telecommunication companies and many other MNCs. Around 70% of students get internships in my course.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities are great, and the surroundings are also clean. The campus has full Wi-Fi, and there is a big computer lab. We also have a huge library. Hostel life is very good here, and the quality of food is also good. Sometimes, the food is really tasty. The canteen is stocked with varieties, and the sports room is equipped with gaming equipment. We play a lot of games here.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Education(B.Ed.) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Very good campus and a very good University.

review_content.Placements: On my behalf, students need to have a minimum of 70% marks to get admission to the University campus. The highest package at the University is 2 crore and the lowest is 50 lakhs, with an average of 75 lakhs. Top recurring companies include Amazon, Flipkart, Google, Myntra, Microsoft, and TCS.
review_content.Infrastructure: The faculty of the department is very supportive and knowledgeable. The campus of the University is very good, and the atmosphere is awesome. The other staff are amazing. I recommend everyone to visit the University campus and engage in fruitful discussions.

review_summary.college_name: Dr K.N Modi University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Totally worth it, value for money, good placements, great campus, good events, and great teachers.

content.Placements: Dr. K.N Modi University is great for your future. Many students got placed here. The average package here is 6 LPA - 7 LPA. The highest package is 1.2 crore. Top recruiters are Amazon, Accenture, TCS, etc. Around 60% of students got placements from here.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available. There is a huge library with almost 10,000 books in it. The library has sitting capacity of upto 200 students. Hotels and mess food are great. Hostel rooms are great. Gym is also here with all equipments. A gym trainer is also there. Sports teachers are also good. The place has an aesthetic picture. The campus is very big and great including a sports ground for all.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The faculty here is excellent. Infrastructure and facilities are the things that impressed me.

content.Placements: The university offers placements in different companies and organizations like Amazon and other companies. Placement percentage in the university is above average. Top recruiting companies are from IT sector and pharmacy. There are many top roles offered in our course like software developer, data analyst, and web developer.
content.Infrastructure: The thing that impressed me the most is how serious the university offers a balanced education. The sports facilities are wonderful, with special grounds for cricket, volleyball, and basketball, as well as indoor sports such as chess, table tennis, and badminton. The campus has facilities like a canteen, laboratories, webinar room, auditorium, and hygienic classrooms with projectors. Although I do hope that the washrooms are in a cleaner condition - that is an area they can improve upon. The condition of washrooms is not much good. The hostels are well serviced and comfortable.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Didn't match my standards.

content.Placements: I have 30 students in my course. The highest package in my course is around 10 LPA to 20 LPA, and the lowest is around 4 LPA. Companies that recruit BCA students are telecommunication companies and many other MNCs. Around 70% of students get internships in my course.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are great, and the surroundings are also clean. The campus has full Wi-Fi, and there is a big computer lab. We also have a huge library. Hostel life is very good here, and the quality of food is also good. Sometimes, the food is really tasty. The canteen is stocked with varieties, and the sports room is equipped with gaming equipment. We play a lot of games here.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Education(B.Ed.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Very good campus and a very good University.

content.Placements: On my behalf, students need to have a minimum of 70% marks to get admission to the University campus. The highest package at the University is 2 crore and the lowest is 50 lakhs, with an average of 75 lakhs. Top recurring companies include Amazon, Flipkart, Google, Myntra, Microsoft, and TCS.
content.Infrastructure: The faculty of the department is very supportive and knowledgeable. The campus of the University is very good, and the atmosphere is awesome. The other staff are amazing. I recommend everyone to visit the University campus and engage in fruitful discussions.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Dr. K. N. Modi University, Newai, Tonk, Rajasthan.

content.Placements: Placements are not very entertaining; it's easy for students to get off-campus placements. I don't know the highest package because in my course, none of the students got placed in internships. Students can get an off-campus placement; that's the only option and can't depend on the college.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is pretty nice. Faculty and staff are also cooperative sometimes, but much of the time, they are not responsive to any problems and issues. Many of the staff are aggressive and egoistic. They don't even behave like faculty; they are just ridiculous.

reviews.review_heading: Totally worth it, value for money, good placements, great campus, good events, and great teachers.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available. There is a huge library with almost 10,000 books in it. The library has sitting capacity of upto 200 students. Hotels and mess food are great. Hostel rooms are great. Gym is also here with all equipments. A gym trainer is also there. Sports teachers are also good. The place has an aesthetic picture. The campus is very big and great including a sports ground for all.

reviews.review_heading: The faculty here is excellent. Infrastructure and facilities are the things that impressed me.
reviews.review_text: The thing that impressed me the most is how serious the university offers a balanced education. The sports facilities are wonderful, with special grounds for cricket, volleyball, and basketball, as well as indoor sports such as chess, table tennis, and badminton. The campus has facilities like a canteen, laboratories, webinar room, auditorium, and hygienic classrooms with projectors. Although I do hope that the washrooms are in a cleaner condition - that is an area they can improve upon. The c...

reviews.review_heading: Didn't match my standards.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are great, and the surroundings are also clean. The campus has full Wi-Fi, and there is a big computer lab. We also have a huge library. Hostel life is very good here, and the quality of food is also good. Sometimes, the food is really tasty. The canteen is stocked with varieties, and the sports room is equipped with gaming equipment. We play a lot of games here.

reviews.review_heading: Very good campus and a very good University.
reviews.review_text: The faculty of the department is very supportive and knowledgeable. The campus of the University is very good, and the atmosphere is awesome. The other staff are amazing. I recommend everyone to visit the University campus and engage in fruitful discussions.

reviews.review_heading: Dr. K. N. Modi University, Newai, Tonk, Rajasthan.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is pretty nice. Faculty and staff are also cooperative sometimes, but much of the time, they are not responsive to any problems and issues. Many of the staff are aggressive and egoistic. They don't even behave like faculty; they are just ridiculous.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied as I am here only for a degree.
reviews.review_text: Dr. K N Modi University campus provides full residential facilities for the students. The campus is a safe study haven for the students who study with their dedication. The campus encourages students to productive learning. The campus facilities are connected with internet facilities. Other campus facilities include a photocopier, courier, transport, and medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Not a college but it's like a family.
reviews.review_text: There is very well infrastructure and the best facilities are provided to all the students and staff members. Various labs, classrooms, library, moot court, sports room, playground, auditorium, and canteen are available at the university campus. More and more facilities are added every year.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college is the best for English medium and also for Hindi medium students.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides a central library, air-conditioned or non-air-conditioned hostel and Wi-Fi with 5 GB limit monthly. Our college provides separate boys and girls hostel with full security. Our college provides both vegetarian and non-vegetarian mess. There is also a canteen, gym and sports in a large area. It also has a dispensary. It provides all labs like physics, chemistry, bio, engineering, pharmacy, agriculture, etc. Classrooms are non-air-conditioned.

reviews.review_heading: It is an average college with minimum fees structure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college was beautiful. It had one library, separate labs, two mess, one canteen, one food court and the entire campus was Wi-Fi enabled. College had on-campus 4 boys hostel and 1 girls hostel. Timings of each hostel were fixed for safety reasons.

reviews.review_heading: Good environment and facilities are available. All staff members are supportive.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi enabled labs are available where students access the internet. The library is situated in a good place where students can easily collect books. Our university has good space for conducting indoor and outdoor activities. Students can enjoy playing games, and medical facilities are moderate.

reviews.review_heading: It maintains the right balance of free time and academics, so you can realise what you desire.
reviews.review_text: Everything is available here. A doctor is available every day in the evening for a couple of hours, and every student is encouraged to play sports. There will be no any kind of discrimination. The food served in the mess is pretty good, but the same menu is maintained for years, which may make students yearn for some change. A non-vegetarian food serving mess is also available.

reviews.review_heading: There were a lot of job offers during our tenure. We had very friendly faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The entire campus was lush green, and the food served in the mess was excellent. There is a total of more than 20 games for students, and there are 2 different kinds of canteens on our campus. The medical centre was available 24x7, and a super deluxe room is also available.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college to enjoy college life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very attractive, and there are 4 boys hostels and one girl's hostel. Every hostel block has specific wardens, and vegetarian and non-vegetarian food is served to students in the hostel. Our college has a separate basketball court, volleyball court, badminton court, cricket ground, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Dr K.N Modi University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college was beautiful, and anyone can like it. It looked like a palace. The college had 5 boys hostel and one girls' hostel. They serve both vegetarian and non-vegetarian meals. The entire college was Wi-Fi enabled. There were proper courts and grounds available like for volleyball, cricket, basketball, badminton, etc. The college had one canteen and one food court.

reviews.review_heading: It has a really good infrastructure, but I am absolutely dissatisfied because of management.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is good, but the facilities might be better. There are good facilities like Wi-Fi, library and classrooms, but our college needs to improve labs. The quality of the facilities provided in the hostels is good. They offer sports and games, and there is a canteen to buy things daily.

placements.overview: OSOU is an Open University, therefore, it does not facilitate on-campus placement opportunities for the students. However, the University offers placement assistance for seeking jobs in the relevant industry. Along with this, the University also provides training and career guidance services to shape the career of students by developing their personalities. As per the data derived from multiple sources, 30-40 per cent of OSOU pass-outs of 2020 batch got placed with a highest CTC offered of Rs 10 LPA while the average CTC ranged between Rs 3-4 LPA.

faqs.question: What is the pass mark of OSOU?
faqs.answer: Odisha State Open University evaluation system is based on two core components-continuous evaluation (assignments) and term-end examination. Continuous evaluation will carry 25% weightage and the term end semester examination will have 75% weightage. In courses having practical, the term end examination will carry 50% weightage and practical examination will have 25% weightage.The minimum mark to complete each component of the course, overall score and successful completion of the programme is 40%. The minimum pass mark required to complete the project related course is also 40%.

faqs.question: Q: Are there any specializations offered by Deen Dayal Rustagi College of Pharmacy?

faqs.answer: Deen Dayal Rustagi College of Pharmacy has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.PharmaCandidate must have minimum age 17 years or more on 31-12-2023. Candidates who have qualified any other qualification approved by the Pharmacy Council of India equivalent to any of the above examinations are also eligible to apply.D.PharmaCandidate must have passed 10+2 examination or equivalent with pass in Chemistry, Physics and Biology/Mathematics from a recognised board Or Candidate who has passed Intermediate examination in Science Or Candidate who are in First year of the three years degree courses in Science Or Candidate who has passed 12 years Higher Secondary Education Board Exam (Science academic stream with Physics, Chemistry, Biology) of Higher Secondary Education Board, Nepal Or Pre-degree examination or Any other qualification approved by Pharmacy Council of India as equivalent to any of the above examination can also apply for the course.After 10th DiplomaCandidate must have passed 10th Std/ SSC Examination from a recognised board.

rows:
